    Country
    Board.getCountryByName(String countryName)
    Returns the country object for the country specified by the string countryName
    Methods in org.atlanmod.risk that return types with arguments of type Country
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Country>
    Board.getAdjacencies(String countryName)
    Returns a list of the country objects that are the countries adjacent to the country specified by the string countryName on the board
    List<Country>
    Country.getAdjacencies()
    Returns a list of the country objects that are adjacent to this country on the baord
    List<Country>
    Board.getCountries()
    Returns a list of all of the country objects in the board
    List<Country>
    Board.getMemberCountries(String continentName)
    Returns a list of the country objects that are in the continent specified by the string continentName
    List<Country>
    Continent.getMemberCountries()
    Retuens a list of the country objects that are on this continent
    List<Country>

    Method
    Description
    void
    Player.addCountry(Country country)
    When a player conquers a country the country needs to be added to a data structure that keeps track of all the countries the player occupies

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Country.addAdjacencies(List<Country> adjacencies)
    Used only when contstructing the country object, it should not be called after the board is initialized
